title: Noised
description: Makes the textures very noisy (perfect for horror).
body:
### What is noised?
Noised is a 32x texture pack that makes the textures noisy, which makes it feel like older minecraft versions.
The pack is simple and perfect for horror modpacks and just plain vanilla minecraft.

Every texture that I could change has added noise (some aren't textured because it is buggy), so it includes gui, overlays, and misc textures.


![Noised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c5db05e35f2c8c46b5c4b7d425f969379c3f38d.png)
